##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Black granular or tabular crystals embeded in thénardite, associated with black bladed or prismatic lyonsite. Crystal is twinned by a 2-fold rotation about [-1 -1 1].
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
